verses.text: Topa in, “Amah ka ciahsakna, na nu a kimakna lai koi-ah om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh nang kong zuakna ka leibatnate koi pan ahi hiam? Nomau mawhna hangin note hong kizuak a, nomau khialhna hangin na nu uh kipaikhiasak hi

“Kong pai ciangin bang hangin mi khat zong omlo ahi hiam? Kong sap ciangin bang hangin hong dawng ding khat zong omlo ahi hiam? Hong hon zolo zah dingin ka khut hatlo lua ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong note khahkhiatna ding vangliatna neilo ka hi hiam? Keima taina tawh tuipi ka keusak a, gunte pen sehnel gam ka suaksak hi. Tui omloh manin a ngasate dangtakin si-in a uih gawp hi
Vantungte khuamial ka silhsak a, amau' kituamna dingin puanhampi ka bawl hi,” a ci hi.
A lunggim mite ka thahatsak theihna dingin Topa Pasian in ka gen ding thu hong hilh khin hi. Ama hong hilhnate a ngai dingin zingsang simin lawpna hong guan' hi
Topa Pasian in thu theihtelna hong guan' hi. Amah ka lehdo kei a, zong ka nungngat kei hi
Hong satte, ka nung ka dawh a, ka khamulin a hong kai mite, ka paang ka dawh hi. Maizumna leh cilphihna panin ka maitang ka hei kei hi
Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Tua ahih ciangin cihna ding theiloin ka om kei hi. Tua ahih manin ka thuak tentan a, hong maizumsak lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi

Ka thumanna a langsak Pasian a nai-ah hong om hi. Keima langkhatah kua hong pangzo ding ahi hiam? Thukhen zumah kikhia nu'ng. Thukhen zumah kua in hong khia nuam ahi hiam? Kei hong langpang dingin hong kuan ta hen
Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Kua in kei mawh hi, ci-in gen thei ding ahi hiam? Amaute khempeuh puan bangin paatkhia ding uh a, nget in amaute netum ding hi
Topa kihta a, a nasempa' thu a mangte khempeuh khuamial sungah na pai hangun Topa muang un la, Pasian suan'in nei un
Midang suksiat ding a sawm mite aw, note' vaihawm siatna mah in note hong susia ding hi. Topa' khut tung panin gimna thuakin na lumsuk ding uh hi.
